function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the two oldest invoices linked to Nina.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Verification check: attachment paths were both previously read; attachments are newest-first among requested two oldest invoices (2025-12-01 then 2025-11-03); recipient matches canonical Miles record; subject quoting is YAML-safe. Next required workflow step is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Outbound email record was written to 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Task executed end-to-end: processed next inbox email request, verified identity and finance links, drafted outbound reply with correct attachments, and deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the requested action.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the requested action. I created an outbound email draft to miles@novak.example with the two oldest Nina-linked invoices attached, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS files for each entered folder, used inbox processing and email workflows, verified sender via canonical primary_contact_email, used canonical finance evidence, wrote a single outbox record, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox frontmatter showed sender miles@novak.example; this matched 10_entities/cast/miles.md primary_contact_email. Nina-linked invoices were established by explicit `related_entity | Nina Schreiber` fields in invoice records. The two oldest such invoices confirmed were dated 2025-11-03 (INV-0001) and 2025-12-01 (INV-0002). Outbound draft was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with those two attachments in required newest-first order, then the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
